heading: Thursday Night
text: Mostly cloudy. A rising chance of evening showers, then likely overnight; chance of a thunderstorm. Lows from the mid 50s to lower 60s. South to southeast winds around 5 mph.

heading: Friday
text: Mostly cloudy. Scattered showers and thunderstorms; slight chance of a severe storm, mainly from Route 2 southward. Highs in the low to mid 70s north, mid 70s to around 80 in the south. Winds becoming southwest 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Friday Night
text: Scattered showers and thunderstorms, mainly north and tapering off early, then partly cloudy. Lows from the mid 50s to lower 60s. Winds becoming light, variable to north.
